name: Miniclaw Blog
description: Persona-driven blog writing — journal entries, self-reflection, and storytelling from the agent's own perspective. Uses mc-soul for character voice, mc-kb/mc-memo for grounded context, and openclaw memory for continuity.

postsDir.description: Directory for post JSON seeds and body markdown (default: ~/.openclaw/USER/blog/posts)

addendumDir.description: Directory for post addendums / grounding metadata (default: ~/.openclaw/USER/blog/addendums)

voiceRulesPath.description: Path to voice-rules.json — persona-specific writing rules, banned words, tone guidance

arcPlanPath.description: Path to arc-plan.json — weekly/seasonal arc definitions with themes, seeds, and voice shifts

defaultAuthor.description: Default author name for posts (falls back to agent name from soul config)

blogUrl.description: Base URL of the published blog (for canonical links, cross-posting)

languages.description: Languages to produce (ISO 639-1 codes, e.g. ['en', 'es']). First is primary.
